page_subtitle_reminders: Stay on track with your health and self-care schedule.
page_subtitle_reports: Visualize your wellness journey and celebrate your progress.
page_subtitle_skincare: Track your daily skincare rituals for a healthy glow.
page_subtitle_water: Stay hydrated to feel your best. Aim for 8 glasses a day.
page_subtitle_chatbot: Your personal guide for health, wellness, and self-care questions.
page_subtitle_achievements: Celebrate your wellness journey and track your progress.
page_subtitle_journal: Reflect on your day and track your emotional well-being.

signup_prompt: Join LunaWell to start your wellness journey.
journal_placeholder: Write about how you’re feeling today...
journal_footer_note: Journal entries help identify wellness patterns over time.

page_subtitle_diet: Log your daily meals to stay mindful of your nutrition.

diet_gentle_day_note: Eat light and take care today 💗
diet_post_meal_mood: How did you feel after this meal?
no_health_data: No health data recorded today yet.
period_prediction_desc: Personalized prediction based on your cycle history

cycle_tracking_desc: Track your cycle for wellness insights.
cycle_note: Used only for wellness tracking, not medical diagnosis.
health_saved_desc: Your wellness data has been updated successfully.
journal_reflect_desc: Take a moment to reflect on your physical and emotional state.
am_routine_desc: Prepare and protect your skin for the day ahead.
pm_routine_desc: Repair and rejuvenate your skin while you sleep.
add_product_desc: Enter the name of the product you want to add to your routine.
reminder_description: Set a reminder for your medication, appointments, or self-care activities.
title: Title
sleep_last_7_days: Average sleep duration over the last 7 days.
water_last_week: Daily water intake over the last week.
mood_chart_description: This chart is generated from your real mood logs.
hydration_desc: You've been consistently drinking enough water.
achievements_desc: Achievements are based on regular self-care activities.
breast_awareness_subtitle: Early detection can save lives. Learn the warning signs and practice regular self-examination.
breast_cancer_desc: Breast cancer occurs when abnormal cells grow uncontrollably in breast tissue. Early detection increases treatment success.
warning_1: Lump in the breast or underarm
warning_2: Change in breast size or shape
warning_5: Pain in a specific area of the breast
exam_1: Stand in front of a mirror with shoulders straight.
exam_2: Check for shape, swelling, or skin changes.
exam_6: Repeat once every month after your period cycle.
consult_desc: If you notice any unusual changes or persistent pain, consult a healthcare professional immediately.
chatbot_desc: I'm here to help you take care of yourself. Ask me anything about women's health, wellness, and self-care.
chatbot_error: Sorry, I couldn't process your request. Please try again.
chatbot_welcome: Hi, I'm Kiki 🌸 Your wellness companion
